required_evidence.label: SERP, keyword, competitor, page, or structured-data evidence from DataForSEO.
Commerce orders, products, customers, inventory, or discounts as required by the question.

shopmcp.prompt: Run the Schema and Rich Result Readiness play for the last 30 days. Keep it read-only.
